name: White Chili Con Caucasian- American
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with Pam.
2. Add olive oil and heat on medium high until hot.
3. Add diced chicken and sauté for 3 minutes or until cooked through. Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add shallots and garlic and sauté until tender.
5. Stir in tomatoes, chicken broth, chili peppers, and spices. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Add chicken and beans, cook for 5 minutes, stir in lime juice and pepper.
7. Heat through before adding to the crockpot.
8. Cook in the crockpot for 8 hours.
9. Serve in chili bowls, topped with cheese. Enjoy with tortilla chips, sour cream, avocado dip, and beer.
